rulings.Case Title: RIMMA BOROKHOV et al VS. FREEDOM WEST HOMES, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Pltf'S Motion To Amend Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 22, 2013, line 1 - PLAINTIFFs RIMMA BOROKHOV, DAVID TSE and MICHAEL TO's Motion To Amend Complaint. Continued to April 29, 2013 per April 18, 2013 stipulation and order. =(501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS SUCCESSOR VS. STEPHANIE NAIFEH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Corrected Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogs And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 22, 2013, line 2 - DEFENDANT ADAM WHITE's Corrected Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatores And For Sanctions. Defendant's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Form Interrogatories is DENIED. No sanctions. =(501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: VALERIE GORNAIA VS. WELLS FARGO HOME MORTGAGE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 22, 2013, line 10 - DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Continued to April 29, 2013 to be heard in Department 303 by Honorable Richard A. Kramer. =(501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: EUGENIO DE ARNAL VS. JOHN PASINI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 22, 2013, line 11 - PLAINTIFF EUGENIO DE ARNAL's Motion To Disqualify. Plaintiff's Motion to Disqualify is GRANTED. Defendant cited no authority for the proposition that having no memory of prior representation relating to the same subject matter is a factor to be considered under Rule of Professional Conduct 3-310(E). =(501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGE KELLY VS. GEORGE POON et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 22, 2013, line 3 - PLAINTIFF GEORGE KELLY's Motion To Compel responses to requests for production documents. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel responses to Requests for Production Set One ##7, 8, 9, 10 and 11 is GRANTED. Defendant shall produce responsive documents and/or privilege log no later than May 13, 2013. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,400 to be paid within 30 days. =(501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: NASIR PATEL VS. MARK THOMAS EDWARDS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Discovery And Inspection Of The Evidnece - Attach For Production Of Records Request By Deft
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 22, 2013, line 4 - DEFENDANT MARK EDWARDS' Motion For Discovery And Inspection Of The Evidnece - Attach For Production Of Records Request. Defendant's Motion for Discovery and Inspection of the Evidence is DENIED. Defendant failed to sustain his burden. No evidence was provided to the Court regarding service of discovery requests on Plaintiff; expiration of time to respond; or service of this motion. =(501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: LAN LE VS. CARRIE LESPERANCE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 22, 2013, line 5 - DEFENDANT CARRIE LESPERANCE's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to allege in good faith compliance with Rent Board Regulation 12.20. = (501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: KWOK WAH CHU VS. KELLY GRABIANOWSKI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Comple Pltf To Respond To Interrogatories And Req. For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 22, 2013, line 6 - DEFENDANT KELLY GRABIANOWSKI's Motion To Comple Plaintiff To Respond To Interrogatories And Req. For Monetary Sanctions. Defendant's Motion to Compel Responses to Form and Special Interrogatories is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall provide discovery responses no later than April 23, 2013. Sanctions in the amount of $ 1,375. =(501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: JIMMIE H. YEE VS. CHACOL-WANDERLEY VAZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 22, 2013, line 7 - DEFENDANT VAZ, CHACAL-WANDERLEY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurer to Complaint is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE to amend for Plaintiff to attach an unobstructed copy of the "3 Day Notice". =(501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: PREFERRED REALTY ADVISORS, INC. VS. LUTRECE DAVIS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 22, 2013, line 8 - DEFENDANT LUTRECE DAVIS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO reconcile in good faith Notice demanding $789 for 2/1/13-2/28/13 and rental agreement alleged in paragraph 6 of Complaint. =(501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: 305 HYDE STREET LP VS. YASHIN ALABDY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 22, 2013, line 9 - DEFENDANT YASIN ALABDY MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Defendant's Motion to Quash is DENIED, 5 days to respond. Defendant was served by substitute service by registered process server. =(501/EHG)
